name: Avidbank Holdings, Inc.
summary: Avidbank Holdings, Inc. is a bank holding company based in San Jose, California, operating through its wholly owned subsidiary Avidbank, a California state-chartered bank founded in 2003. The company provides commercial banking services including Corporate Banking, Venture Lending, Specialty Finance, Commercial Real Estate, and Construction Lending. It serves small-to-medium sized businesses, technology companies, and individuals, with operations primarily in the Bay Area and a growing national presence. As of December 31, 2025, it had $2.57 billion in total assets.

products.name: Corporate Banking
products.description: Commercial & Industrial lending to small to mid-sized privately held Bay Area businesses for operations, expansions, and acquisitions.

products.name: Venture Lending
products.description: Lending to venture capital and private equity-backed companies with negative cash flow and institutional investor support.

products.name: Specialty Finance
products.description: Includes Sponsor Finance, Asset-Based Lending, and Accounts Receivable Factoring/Finance for institutionally backed and cash-flow-positive borrowers.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Lending
products.description: Real estate lending focused primarily in the Bay Area.

products.name: Construction Lending
products.description: Real estate construction lending primarily in the Bay Area.

products.name: Treasury Management Services
products.description: Deposit and treasury management solutions for commercial clients.

products.name: Digital Banking
products.description: Digital banking capabilities offered to clients alongside traditional banking products.
